title: thymus pulegioides var. parviflorus
intro: Thymus pulegioides var. parviflorus, also known as Thymus parviflorus or Thymus pulegioides, is a perennial herbaceous plant within the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its antimicrobial, antioxidant, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Thymus pulegioides var. parviflorus include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and exhibit antimicrobial effects against certain bacteria and fungi. Thymus pulegioides var. parviflorus can be prepared into teas, infusions, or essential oils for medicinal use.
